# JewelPetal — Handcrafted Jewelry & Accessory Gift Bouquets

> JewelPetal is an elegant gifting brand from India creating handcrafted jewelry & fashion accessory bouquets designed to last. We believe in replacing temporary flowers with enduring wearable beauty.

## Brand Narrative
Flowers die in three days. We make things that last. Every JewelPetal bouquet is custom designed, styled by hand, and wrapped in premium materials. Each bouquet contains real, wearable jewelry and hair accessories that the recipient can keep forever.

## Core Collections
- **The Mini Jewelry Bouquet** (dynamic pricing: ₹150 - ₹250): A beautiful, lightweight gesture containing 1-5 handcrafted jewelry items. Excellent for bulk gifting, corporate orders, and light tokens of affection.
- **The Standard 7-Item Bouquet** (₹599): Our signature gift bouquet featuring 7 hand-rolled premium jewelry items (exquisite earrings, dainty necklaces, delicate bracelets, and hair claws) arranged with botanical wraps.
- **The Standard 9-Item Bouquet** (₹699): An elevated luxury arrangement containing 9 premium jewelry and hair styling pieces nestled beautifully in coordinated pastel linen wrapping layers.
- **The Premium Custom Bouquet** (Starting at ₹999): A grand custom-styled bouquet featuring 10+ premium jewelry elements. Fully customizable with options to add chocolates, photographs, and hand-knit crochet items.

## Key URLs
- Homepage: https://jewelpetal.in
- Our Story: https://jewelpetal.in/our-story
- How We Make It: https://jewelpetal.in/how-we-make-it
- Gift Guide: https://jewelpetal.in/gift-guide
- FAQ: https://jewelpetal.in/faq
- Shipping Policy: https://jewelpetal.in/shipping
- Contact Us: https://jewelpetal.in/contact

## E-E-A-T & Quality Signals
- Founded in 2025 by Nancy Gupta, who wanted to solve the wastefulness of temporary floral gifts with functional, premium luxury accessories.
- Every bouquet is handcrafted and arranged in India.
- We utilize high-quality, lead-free, nickel-free brass and copper-based jewelry pieces combined with exquisite ribbonry.
- Primary contact: guptanancy1249@gmail.com
